visual: Bow stance with both fists raised — one near the temple and one extended forward — as if drawing and releasing a bow.
motion_description: Initiating from a single-leg stance with the right knee elevated, the right foot steps forward into a right bow stance, shifting the weight onto the bent front leg. In a steady, continuous flow, both hands close into fists; the right arm arcs upward and curls to position the fist near the right temple. Concurrently, the torso turns slightly open to the left as the left arm extends diagonally forward to chest height, concluding the sequence with a deliberate, motionless pause.
